script_text: We will do a short reading check. Listen carefully and try your best.
Look at the letter. Say the letter clearly when you are ready.
Listen to the word. Say one word that rhymes with it.
Read the sentence. Pay close attention to the target word.
Read the passage aloud. Keep reading until the timer stops.
Choose the best answer for each question about the passage.
We will do the reading check again to see your progress.
Your reading results are being checked using the ReaDirect rules.
Your next reading practice step is ready.
Let us practice one small reading step at a time.
Great effort. Take a breath and try again.
Nice reading. You are ready for the next step.
